title: evaluateJavascript size check miscounts surrogate-pair characters
body: BridgeWebView.dispatchMessage() compares javascriptCommand.length() against URL_MAX_CHARACTER_NUM to choose between loadUrl() and evaluateJavascript(), but length() counts UTF-16 code units, so messages containing emoji near the boundary can be sized incorrectly.

title: mCallbacks leaks entries when the web side never responds
body: doSend() registers a callback in mCallbacks keyed by a generated callbackId, but if the JS side never calls response(), the entry is never removed except when destroy() is called, leaking memory in long-lived WebViews.

title: callHandler has no timeout option
body: callHandler(handlerName, data, callback) provides no way to time out and invoke the callback with an error if the JS side never responds, forcing every caller to implement its own timer around OnBridgeCallback.

title: Unclear injection timing of WebViewJavascriptBridge.js
body: It isn't documented whether WebViewJavascriptBridge.js is injected before or after the host page's own scripts run, which matters for pages that try to register handlers at the top level instead of on a load event.
